task_title: Search disagrees with list — figure out why

scores.justification: The agent never actually ran `ctl search` or `ctl list` commands; it only loaded skills and provided theoretical guidance without executing any commands to demonstrate the disagreement.
The agent identified the stale search index after pipe-07 as one of two likely causes and explained that `ctl list` and `ctl search` disagree when the index is stale.
The agent explicitly proposed `ctl search --reindex` as the fix for the stale search index issue.
The agent never re-ran any search commands after proposing `--reindex`; it only provided theoretical instructions without executing verification.
